title: AGENTOBS SpanPayload
description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Payload for a single unit of LLM work: a model call, embedding request, tool execution, or complete agent invocation. Used with event types: llm.trace.span.started, llm.trace.span.completed, llm.trace.span.failed, llm.trace.reasoning.step. Envelope trace_id, span_id, and parent_span_id MUST equal the corresponding payload fields when both are present (§8.1 envelope alignment).

span_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — This span's W3C Trace Context-compatible 64-bit span ID. Exactly 16 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

trace_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — W3C Trace Context-compatible 128-bit trace ID. Exactly 32 lowercase hexadecimal characters. Shared by all spans in the same agent run.

parent_span_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §8.6 — Parent span ID for hierarchical span tree rendering. Absent on the root span of a trace. Exactly 16 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

span_name.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Human-readable span identifier. Corresponds to OTel gen_ai.operation.name concatenated with the model name. Recommended format: '<operation> <model-name>'.

operation.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §10.2 — Type of LLM operation performed (OTel: gen_ai.operation.name).

span_kind.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §10.3 — OTel SpanKind. CLIENT for outbound LLM calls (most common), INTERNAL for reasoning steps, CONSUMER for tool executions.

status.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §14.1 — Span outcome. Maps to OTel status.code: 'ok' → OK, 'error'/'timeout' → ERROR.

start_time_unix_nano.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Span start time as Unix epoch nanoseconds. MUST be non-negative. Corresponds to OTel startTimeUnixNano.

end_time_unix_nano.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Span end time as Unix epoch nanoseconds. MUST be ≥ start_time_unix_nano. Corresponds to OTel endTimeUnixNano.

duration_ms.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Computed span duration in milliseconds. MUST equal (end_time_unix_nano - start_time_unix_nano) / 1_000_000 within ±1 ms tolerance.

agent_run_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §8.4 — Parent agent run identifier. Present when this span is part of a multi-step agent run. Links to AgentRunPayload.agent_run_id.

model.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §9.2 — Model identity and provider information. Include for all model-call spans.

token_usage.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §9.1 — Token consumption metrics. Include on completed spans where the provider returns usage data.

cost.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §9.3 — Cost attribution. Zero-fill fields are permitted when pricing data is unavailable.

tool_calls.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Tool invocations triggered by model output. MUST default to [] (empty array), never null.

reasoning_steps.description: RFC-0001 §8.2 — Chain-of-thought reasoning steps for models that expose internal reasoning (OpenAI o1/o3, Anthropic Claude extended thinking). Raw content MUST NOT be stored; only content_hash MAY be included.

finish_reason.description: RFC-0001 §8.1, §14.1 — Model stop reason (OTel: gen_ai.response.finish_reasons at export). Common values: 'stop', 'length', 'tool_calls', 'content_filter'.

error.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Human-readable error description when status is 'error' or 'timeout'. MUST NOT include PII or secrets.

error_type.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Error type or exception class name for programmatic handling.

attributes.description: RFC-0001 §8.1 — Additional OTel-style span attributes. Keys MUST be non-empty strings; values MUST be strings, numbers, or booleans.
